title: eschscholzia douglasii
intro: Eschscholzia douglasii, also known as the Douglas' California poppy, is a species of flowering plant in the poppy family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and calm the body. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and aiding in the treatment of insomnia, fever, and coughs. Eschscholzia douglasii can be prepared as a tea or tincture, making it a popular herbal remedy for those seeking natural relief from various health issues.
